legacy.full_text: Hey @Twitch how about instead of handicapping what creators make, you help them make more? Seems more logical.

value.string_value: You can spend it with your favorite brands or products in the app.

legacy.description: Your favorite shopping app. Other credits include one-tap checkout with Shop Pay and package tracking. Find us at https://t.co/aTAWwu8LBr.
legacy.name: Shop

legacy.full_text: I’m giving away $200k Shop Cash in the @shop app – get it while you can and pls spend some on feastables :-) #shopifypartner https://t.co/Yy7DRCbwpf
It went so fast we just added another $300,000! Enjoy the $ 🥰

legacy.description: Jesus loves You                                            Follower of Jesus
legacy.name: Chandler Hallow

legacy.full_text:
I want to test what I do on YouTube on a streaming service for fun to see how it performs 

Imagine a 10 episode series with 10,000 people competing for the largest prize in game show history 👀
New video almost broke the record for most views in 24 hours on a non music video.. guess I should do more like this 🥰 https://t.co/g5hPERwTZM
In the new video we really stepped up the storytelling and editing! I hope you all enjoyed it 🥺❤️
Go watch my new video to see a 1 year old and a 100 year old compete for $500,000 lol

I grabbed 100 people ages 1 thru 100 and had them compete to see which age is the best 👀

Excited for you to see this Saturday! 🥰 https://t.co/lg2841EDpV

I forgot to mention the winner gets $500,000 haha

Also, this video is insane, we used over 300 cameras and filmed for 7 days. Can’t wait for Saturday!

Want to be in a MrBeast video?

legacy.full_text:
Hey! The MrBeast team has a big video coming up and we need lots of people to compete in it. Preferably people that live in NC that way travel is easier but global people are welcomed as well! 
Apply here —> https://t.co/vrBntFXPON
We helped 1,000 deaf people hear again! Go watch :D
Almost 4,000 hours of editing has gone into my next video.. brand new style, can’t wait for all of you to see it Saturday :)

Over a million people celebrated 100,000,000 subscribers with me 🥹

YouTube is the one thing that’s always made me happy and I’m grateful I get to do this all day everyday :) https://t.co/eJk5icuoQd
